CI/CD analytics that actually matter

PipelineIQ gives engineering teams instant visibility into build health, flaky test detection, and deploy tracking — so you ship faster with fewer surprises.

Start free trial View demo

Built for teams that ship fast

PipelineIQ connects directly to your CI/CD system—GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI—and surfaces the metrics that matter. No noise. No dashboards you'll never look at. Just actionable intelligence on build health, test flakiness, and deployment velocity. Engineering teams use PipelineIQ to reduce cycle time, eliminate test friction, and ship with zero surprises.

Powerful insights, zero friction

Everything you need to understand and optimize your CI/CD pipeline.

Build Insights

Real-time visibility into build duration, success rates, and bottlenecks across your entire pipeline.

Flaky Test Detection

Automatically identify unreliable tests before they block your team. Drill down into failure patterns and root causes.

Deploy Tracking

Monitor deployment frequency, lead time, and change failure rate. Track what actually ships and when.

Multi-Platform Support

Connect GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI, and more. One dashboard for all your pipelines.

Enterprise Security

SSO, SAML, audit logs, and data residency options for teams with strict compliance needs.

Real-Time Alerts

Get notified instantly when builds fail, tests flake, or deployments stall. Never miss a critical issue.

Questions? We've got answers.

Everything you need to know about PipelineIQ.

How long do you retain my CI/CD data?

We retain 12 months of historical data on all plans. Enterprise customers can request custom retention policies up to 7 years for compliance.

Do you support SSO and SAML?

Yes. SSO is included on Team and Enterprise plans. We support Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and standard SAML 2.0 providers.

Can I export my data?

Absolutely. You can export raw build and deployment data in CSV or JSON format at any time. Your data is yours.

What CI/CD systems do you support?

We integrate with GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI, Travis CI, and Buildkite. More platforms coming soon.

Is there a free trial?

Yes. Start with our free Solo plan — no credit card required. Upgrade to Team or Enterprise whenever you're ready.
